description: Claude Code AI Behavior & Cost Intelligence Dashboard — metrics, logs, tool patterns, and model efficiency for bootstrapped AI insights

targets.expr: 100 * sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = "api_request" | unwrap cache_read_tokens [$__range])) / (sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = "api_request" | unwrap input_tokens [$__range])) + sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = "api_request" | unwrap cache_read_tokens [$__range])))

panels.title: Cost per API Call by Model

panels.description: Cumulative bytes returned by each tool over time. Tool results become input tokens on subsequent API calls, so this is the best proxy for per-tool token cost. ~4 bytes per token.
panels.title: Token Impact by Tool (Result Size)

panels.description: Top tool-to-tool transitions ranked by frequency. Computed from all tool_result events across sessions.
panels.title: Tool Flow Patterns

panels.description: Most frequently recurring multi-tool sequences (2-6 steps). Patterns like 'Grep -> Read -> Edit' show common workflows.
panels.title: Top Tool Sequences
API Errors by Status Code
panels.description: API errors broken down by HTTP status code
API errors stacked by retry attempt number. Tall stacks with high attempt numbers indicate persistent failures requiring multiple retries.
panels.title: API Retry Attempts
Error Event Log
panels.description: Detailed log of API error events

panels.title: Failed Tool Details
panels.description: Log of failed tool executions with error details
Total Task (subagent) tool calls in the selected time range
panels.title: Subagent Spawns

panels.description: Each bar shows total subagent execution time per interval. Tall bars indicate long-running subagents. Count line shows how many spawned.
panels.title: Subagent Activity

panels.description: Peak API calls in a 1-minute window. Values > 1 indicate parallel API calls (subagents or concurrent tool execution).
panels.title: Peak API Concurrency

panels.description: API calls per 1-minute window. Sustained values > 1 indicate parallel sessions or subagents making concurrent API calls. Spikes show burst patterns.
panels.title: API Call Concurrency by Model

panels.description: Tool executions per 1-minute window by tool. Multiple tools completing in the same window suggests parallel tool execution (common with Read, Grep, Glob batches).
panels.title: Tool Execution Concurrency

panels.description: Cost breakdown by session_id. Multiple active sessions suggest parallel work or subagent sessions.
panels.title: Cost by Session

panels.description: Token usage breakdown by session_id. Helps identify which sessions are most expensive.
panels.title: Tokens by Session
Code Changes Over Time
panels.description: Rate of code additions and removals over time

panels.title: Dev Activity Over Time
panels.description: Commits and pull requests per hour

panels.title: Edit Decisions by Language
panels.description: Distribution of code edit tool decisions across programming languages

panels.title: Edit Accept/Reject Ratio
panels.description: Ratio of accepted vs rejected code edits
Bars show prompt count per interval; line shows average prompt length. Helps identify when you're sending long context-heavy prompts.
panels.title: Prompt Length Distribution

title: Claude Code AI Intelligence (Cloud)
